message:
refactor: improve types, service layers, signals, and streams

Types (budget, cancel, task_context):
- Enhanced budget tracking for cleanup operations
- Improved cancellation token handling
- Better task context management

Service middleware (concurrency_limit, load_shed, rate_limit, retry):
- Improved service layer implementations
- Better integration with cancel protocol

Signal handling (ctrl_c, graceful, kind, shutdown, signal):
- Enhanced graceful shutdown support
- Better signal integration with runtime

Stream combinators:
- Improved stream implementations (any_all, buffered, chain, chunks,
  collect, count, filter, fold, for_each, iter, map, merge, mod,
  receiver_stream, stream, try_stream, zip)
- Better cancel-safety for stream operations

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -15,6 +15,8 @@ pub struct CxInner {
     pub task: TaskId,
     /// Current budget.
     pub budget: Budget,
+    /// Baseline budget used for checkpoint accounting.
+    pub budget_baseline: Budget,
     /// Whether cancellation has been requested.
     pub cancel_requested: bool,
     /// The reason for cancellation, if requested.
@@ -31,6 +33,7 @@ impl CxInner {
             region,
             task,
             budget,
+            budget_baseline: budget,
             cancel_requested: false,
             cancel_reason: None,
             mask_depth: 0,
